subject: A bearded smith or craftsman strikes a glowing object on an anvil with a hammer in a forge
description: A large-framed humanoid figure — bald, with a long flowing beard — stands over a heavy anvil, hammer raised overhead in mid-strike. The object being struck on the anvil emits intense orange-gold light, and sparks scatter outward in all directions. The surrounding environment is a forge or foundry — industrial machinery and large gear-like or wheel structures are visible in the background. The lighting is entirely from the forge glow, casting dramatic upward shadows across the smith's face.
foreground: Bald bearded smith mid-hammer-strike on glowing anvil; sparks flying
background: Forge interior; large wheel or gear machinery; glowing ember light
emotion: intense focus and physical exertion — arms raised, body committed to the strike
